title: shortcutColumn operation
description: Preliminary column design by the Fenske-Underwood-Gilliland (FUG) shortcut method.  Specify the two key components and their recoveries to the distillate, plus the operating reflux (refluxRatio directly, or refluxFactor = R/R_min).  Returns N_min (Fenske), R_min (Underwood), the actual stage count N (Gilliland) and the feed stage (Kirkbride).  Assumes constant relative volatility -- not for azeotropes; use the rigorous distillationColumn for those.

lightKey.title: Light key
lightKey.description: The more-volatile key component, sharp at the top.

heavyKey.title: Heavy key
heavyKey.description: The less-volatile key component, sharp at the bottom.

recoveryLK.title: Light-key recovery to distillate
recoveryLK.description: Fraction of the feed light key that leaves in the distillate (e.g. 0.99).

recoveryHK.title: Heavy-key recovery to distillate
recoveryHK.description: Fraction of the feed heavy key that leaves in the distillate (e.g. 0.01).

refluxRatio.title: Operating reflux ratio
refluxRatio.description: Reflux ratio R directly; must exceed R_min.  Use this OR refluxFactor.

refluxFactor.title: Reflux factor R / R_min
refluxFactor.description: Operating reflux as a multiple of the minimum (e.g. 1.3).  Use this OR refluxRatio.
